'''Shimmer''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Rayter sector/Legends|Rayter sector]].

==Description==
Covered with gigantic glaciers,<ref name="J1" /> the planet was located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim's]] Rayter sector.<ref name="EAOC" />

==History==
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], it was the site of a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] medium-security work camp. One of the prisoners was [[Darryn Edalm]], the former [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|governor]] of [[Karra]],<ref name="J1" /> who had been captured during [[Primitive Sentient Protection and Alliance, Operation 265-A: Karra|Operation 265-A]].<ref name="J1" />
